original_image_tags: A large, vintage U.S. Government "World Aeronautical Chart" for the Illinois River region. The chart is aged, showing wear, tape repairs, and significant fold creases. It covers a large portion of the Midwest, centered on Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana, with Lake Michigan clearly visible on the right. Numerous cities, towns, airways, and geographical features are detailed.

elements.description: A vintage 'World Aeronautical Chart' titled '(308) Illinois River' covering parts of the US Midwest (Wisconsin, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Minnesota). It features topographical and aeronautical details, including a large body of water labeled 'MICHIGAN' on the right side. A blue handwritten arrow and the text 'LILY LAKE' are drawn on the map near the Lake Michigan shore.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a vintage 'World Aeronautical Chart' for the Illinois River region covering the US Midwest with Lake Michigan visible), but Description B adds specific details like a handwritten arrow and 'LILY LAKE' text that Description A omits.
